functions.name: DATESYTD
functions.description: Returns a table with dates from the beginning of the year to the last date in the current context.

functions.name: TOTALYTD
functions.description: Calculates a year-to-date value for the specified measure.

functions.name: SUMX
functions.description: Returns the sum of an expression evaluated over a table.

functions.name: AVERAGEX
functions.description: Calculates the average of an expression evaluated over a table.

functions.name: FILTER
functions.description: Returns a table that represents a subset of another table or expression.

functions.name: DISTINCTCOUNT
functions.description: Counts the number of distinct values in a column.

functions.name: DIVIDE
functions.description: Performs division and returns alternate result or BLANK() on division by 0.

functions.name: STDEVX.P
functions.description: Returns the standard deviation of an expression evaluated over a table.

functions.name: SQRT
functions.description: Returns the square root of a number.

functions.name: MINX
functions.description: Returns the minimum value of an expression evaluated over a table.

functions.name: MAXX
functions.description: Returns the maximum value of an expression evaluated over a table.

functions.name: MULTIPLY
functions.description: Returns the result of multiplying two numbers.

functions.name: SUBTRACT
functions.description: Returns the result of subtracting the second argument from the first argument.

functions.name: ADD
functions.description: Returns the result of adding two numbers.

functions.name: COALESCE
functions.description: Returns the first expression that does not evaluate to BLANK.

functions.name: MAX
functions.description: Returns the maximum value in a column.

functions.name: SUMX
functions.description: Returns the sum of an expression evaluated over a table.

functions.name: AVERAGEX
functions.description: Calculates the average of an expression evaluated over a table.

functions.description: Returns a table that represents a subset of another table or expression.

functions.name: DISTINCTCOUNT
functions.description: Counts the number of distinct values in a column.

functions.name: DIVIDE
functions.description: Performs division and returns alternate result or BLANK() on division by 0.

functions.name: STDEVX.P
functions.description: Returns the standard deviation of an expression evaluated over a table.

functions.name: SQRT
functions.description: Returns the square root of a number.

functions.name: MINX
functions.description: Returns the minimum value of an expression evaluated over a table.

functions.name: MAXX
functions.description: Returns the maximum value of an expression evaluated over a table.

functions.name: MULTIPLY
functions.description: Returns the result of multiplying two numbers.

functions.name: SUBTRACT
functions.description: Returns the result of subtracting the second argument from the first argument.

functions.name: ADD
functions.description: Returns the result of adding two numbers.

functions.name: COALESCE
functions.description: Returns the first expression that does not evaluate to BLANK.

functions.name: MAX
functions.description: Returns the maximum value in a column.

functions.name: SUM
functions.description: Returns the sum of all the numbers in a column.

functions.name: AVERAGE
functions.description: Returns the average (arithmetic mean) of all the numbers in a column.

functions.name: PERCENTILEX.INC
functions.description: Returns the k-th percentile of values in a column.

functions.name: POWER
functions.description: Returns the result of a number raised to a power.

functions.name: SELECTEDVALUE
functions.description: Returns the value when the context has been filtered down to one distinct value.

metrics.description: Net interest income as a percentage of average earning assets.
Loan loss provisions as a percentage of total loans.
Percentage of loans to large borrowers relative to total loans.
Ratio of stable deposits to total deposits.
Operating expenses as a percentage of operating income.
Net income as a percentage of average total assets.
Net income as a percentage of average equity.
Total loans as a percentage of total deposits.
Non-performing loans as a percentage of total loans.
Regulatory capital as a percentage of risk-weighted assets.
Total of loss ratio and expense ratio - below 100% indicates profitable underwriting.
Claims paid as a percentage of earned premiums.
Underwriting expenses as a percentage of written premiums.
Net underwriting profit or loss.
Percentage of business retained vs. ceded to reinsurers.
Average number of claims per policy or per exposure unit.
Average claim amount per claim.
Outstanding reserves as a percentage of ultimate expected losses.
Policyholder surplus as a percentage of total liabilities.
Maximum expected loss over a specific time period at a given confidence level.
Risk-adjusted return using Sharpe Ratio.
Portfolio turnover ratio measuring trading activity.
Portfolio beta relative to market benchmark.
Standard deviation of active returns vs. benchmark.
Risk-adjusted active return.
Largest peak-to-trough decline in portfolio value.
Return relative to downside volatility.
Excess return over expected return given beta.
Percentage of profitable trades.
High-quality liquid assets relative to net cash outflows over 30 days.
Available stable funding relative to required stable funding over one year.
Tier 1 capital as a percentage of risk-weighted assets.
Tier 1 capital as a percentage of total exposure.
Largest exposure as a percentage of eligible capital.
Capital requirement for market risk exposures.
Average patient satisfaction rating across all services.
Average number of days patients stay in hospital.
Percentage of patients readmitted within 30 days.
Percentage of hospital beds occupied.
Average cost incurred per patient treated.
Rate of hospital-acquired infections per 1000 patient days.
Average number of patients seen per physician per day.
Rate of medication errors per 1000 doses administered.
Average wait time for emergency department patients.
Average revenue generated per hospital bed.
Annual sales revenue per square foot of retail space.
Number of times inventory is sold and replaced over a period.
Average cost to acquire a new customer.
Gross profit as a percentage of sales revenue.
Average dollar amount per customer transaction.
Total revenue expected from a customer over their relationship.
Percentage of inventory lost to theft, damage, or error.
Percentage of store visitors who make a purchase.
Sales revenue per employee hour worked.
Sales performance relative to seasonal average.
Interest income using the effective interest rate (EIR) method for amortised cost instruments (HTM/Loans).
Effective interest amortization of premium (negative) or accretion of discount (positive).
Amortised cost carrying amount rollforward: opening + EIR income − coupons ± amortization − credit_loss − fx.
Unrealised fair value gain/loss for trading (FVTPL) recognised in P&L.
Unrealised fair value gain/loss for AFS (FVOCI) recognised in OCI until realised.
Realised gain/loss on disposal = consideration − carrying amount at sale.
Period movement in expected credit loss (ECL) allowance recognised in P&L.
Remeasurement of monetary items to functional currency at closing rate; P&L impact.
Cumulative translation adjustment (CTA) for foreign operations recognised in OCI.
Investor share of investee profit/loss based on ownership percentage.
Carrying value rollforward: opening + share_of_profit − dividends ± adjustments (OCI/FX/impairment).
Non-controlling interest (NCI) share of subsidiary profit.
Impairment loss when carrying amount exceeds recoverable amount.
Dividend income recognised when the right to receive is established.
Exposure by fair value hierarchy level (Level 1/2/3) for disclosure.
Recycling of accumulated OCI to P&L upon disposal of FVOCI assets.
Convert transaction amount from source to reporting currency using spot FX rate on transaction date.
Average FX rate over reporting period for P&L translation.
Translate monetary assets/liabilities at period-end closing rate.
FX assets minus FX liabilities per currency.
Unhedged FX exposure after derivatives.
Sensitivity of portfolio value to 1% FX move.
Portion of total portfolio return attributable to currency movements.
Hedge P/L divided by exposure P/L.
Cumulative translation adjustment (CTA) reserve for FX translation of foreign operations.
FX gain/loss from settlement of FX transactions.
FX gain/loss from remeasurement of open positions.
